message: The other day, I was rummaging through my closet and stumbled upon my go-bag. You know, the one I packed after binge-watching those emergency prep shows? It's a glorious mix of snacks, a flashlight, and enough first aid supplies to start my own clinic! 😅 I laughed at how over-prepared I was, but then I realized—being ready for the unexpected isn’t a bad thing. It’s like having an insurance policy for peace of mind. This little refresher helped me make sure everything was up to date. How many of you have a go-bag tucked away somewhere?
